method.name: IsInitialised
method.comment: Returns true if the server has been successfully initialised, false otherwise.

method.name: Initialize2
method.comment: Initialises the SimpleWebServer to create an HTTP server that redirects to HTTPS, and an HTTPS server using a Java keystore for TLS. HttpPort: The HTTP port (will redirect to HTTPS). HttpsPort: The HTTPS port to listen on. StaticFilesFolder: The folder containing static files to serve. SubName: The B4A sub prefix to call for GET/POST requests. KeystoreFile: Path to the JKS keystore file. KeyStorePassword: Password for the keystore.

method.name: Start
method.comment: Starts the server(s). Call after Initialize or Initialize2. Return type: @return:true if the server started successfully, false otherwise.

method.name: Stop
method.comment: Stops the server(s) if running. Return type: @return:true if the server was stopped, false if an error occurred.

method.name: SetThreadCount
method.comment: Sets the number of threads for the HTTP server thread pool. Call before Initialize. Set to 0 (default) to use the JDK default executor.

method.name: Initialize
method.comment: Initialises the SimpleWebServer class to create an HTTP server. The server is created on the specified port and will serve static files from the specified folder. Port: The port number to listen on. StaticFilesFolder: The folder containing static files to serve. SubName: The B4A sub prefix to call for GET/POST requests.
